title: Spring Modulith package modules
summary: Match med-expert-match-ce; verify() in CI. No cross-module impl imports.

title: MCP optional at runtime
summary: Core chat must work without ai-architect-6-mcp; try/catch per connection; no-op when no UP servers.

title: OpenAI-compatible client, default Ollama
summary: Same as reference; swappable via env per role; exclude OpenAI auto-config; manual OpenAiChatModelFactory.

title: Split chat vs tool-calling models
summary: gemma4 for chat; functiongemma for ToolCallingAdvisor; three ChatClient beans.

title: AI context layout
summary: Standard agent bootstrap pattern; canonical skills in .agents/skills/; memory in .agents/memory-bank/.

title: Base package com.berdachuk.aichat
summary: Align with com.berdachuk.medexpertmatch; org namespace com.berdachuk.

title: OpenAPI REST contract + generated clients
summary: Single canonical API contract; springdoc publishes spec; IT and chat.js use OpenAPI Generator clients.

title: WSL for Docker on Windows (development)
summary: Docker + Testcontainers reliability on WSL 2 for local dev on Windows.

title: Testcontainers for integration tests
summary: Isolated, reproducible IT; FlywaySchemaIntegrationTest uses postgres:17; mvn verify -Pintegration.

title: M1 stack versions (pragmatic)
summary: Temporary Boot 3.4.4 used only for initial M1 scaffold.

title: Runtime MCP catalog and per-chat selection
summary: Persistent mcp_connection catalog; enabledMcpConnections per chat; REST + UI; MCPToolAdvisor filters by chat selection (REQ-MCP-09-14).

title: Latest stable stack: Boot 4.x + Spring AI 2.0.0
summary: Stay on supported Spring generation; spring-boot-starter-parent 4.1.0; spring-ai-bom 2.0.0; Modulith 2.1.0.

title: Externalized SQL + named bind parameters
summary: Reviewable SQL, no string literals in Java; @InjectSql + sql/ files; NamedParameterJdbcTemplate :name binds only; no inline SQL.

title: Multi-agent memory-bank isolation
summary: Partition memory-bank into reference/generated/registry/records/locks/worktrees to prevent parallel-agent merge conflicts; append-only JSONL registries; per-record files; module locks; worktree scratchpads.
